inline_comments.message:
@Claudio, the docker node is the most complete when it comes to tooling, but the main difference is the existence of docker in it. For jobs that do not use docker I would recommend using the builder-4c-4g nodes since is little bit cheaper than the 8c-8g ones. 

There is no functional issue if you want to use this node for non docker jobs though.

@Jesica, thanks for advice. Then we will proceed with this patch.
Regards

@Jessica, another question. We need to add an enviroment variable, I checked the jobs and I can't add it to Jenkins itself. I dont have rights, what is the way to proceed? Is any chance we could add it in this yaml, and jenkins will pick it?

nevermind, solution found. not need for external solutions.
Thanks
